topPlaces.name: Devulapalle
topPlaces.description: Devulapalle is a popular village situated in Eluru district. The nearest railway station is Eluru located at a distance of more than 10 Km.

topPlaces.name: Jangareddygudem
topPlaces.description: Jangareddygudem (JRG) is a municipality in Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Koyyalagudem mandal
topPlaces.description: Koyyalagudem mandal is one of the 28 mandals in the Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is administered under the Jangareddygudem revenue division Koyyalagudem comes under Polavaram (ST) (Assembly constituency) and Eluru (Lok Sabha constituency).

topPlaces.name: Arempudi
topPlaces.description: Arempudi is a census town in Kakinada district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located near Sankhavaram Mandal of Rampachodavaram revenue division.

items.note: Devulapalle is a popular village situated in Eluru district. The nearest railway station is Eluru located at a distance of more than 10 Km.
Jangareddygudem (JRG) is a municipality in Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

Koyyalagudem mandal is one of the 28 mandals in the Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is administered under the Jangareddygudem revenue division Koyyalagudem comes under Polavaram (ST) (Assembly constituency) and Eluru (Lok Sabha constituency).
Arempudi is a census town in Kakinada district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located near Sankhavaram Mandal of Rampachodavaram revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Maddi Anjaneya Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Maddi Anjaneya Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Maddi Anjaneya Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (94 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Maddi Anjaneya Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Maddi Anjaneya Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Maddi Anjaneya Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Maddi Anjaneya Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Maddi Anjaneya Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Devulapalle, Jangareddygudem, Koyyalagudem mandal, Arempudi.
